title: Pinterest, Inc. (PINS) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: According to Yahoo Finance analyst consensus, Pinterest (PINS) stock has a Moderate Buy rating from 27 analysts covering the company. The average price target is $26.78, forecasting a 34.44% increase in stock price over the next year. Pinterest is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 16.2% and 11.2% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 17.3% per annum. PINS EPS for the last quarter was $0.27 despite the estimation of $0.23. In the next quarter, EPS is expected to reach $0.36. Wall Street sentiment currently sits at a Moderate Buy. Pinterest, Inc. is covered by 53 analysts, with 18 of those analysts submitting estimates of revenue or earnings used as inputs to analyst reports. Analyst sentiment shows that while some analysts have downgraded price targets due to high capital expenditure (CAPEX) in AI, the majority believe Pinterest's niche audience provides a moat against larger competitors.
